message:
fix(db): add cache-bypassing agent lookup, use named columns for inbox, fix connection leaks

- Add get_agent_by_id_fresh for cleanup/integrity paths that need
  authoritative DB state instead of possibly stale cached rows
- Switch fetch_inbox from positional (get_as) to named (get_named)
  column access for resilience against schema changes
- Drop connection handles before delegating to per-id release paths
  in release_reservations and release_expired_reservations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
